message:
ci: add cargo test step to workflow (rust_proxy-66v)

The CI workflow was missing test execution. Added cargo test step
to ensure the 35 unit tests are verified on every push/PR.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -29,3 +29,6 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Check
         run: cargo check --all-targets
+
+      - name: Test
+        run: cargo test
